response.justification: Candidate has strong full-stack engineering breadth across many languages and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, which aligns with the AI-native environment. However, the resume shows limited evidence of deep Python expertise (a must-have) and the distributed/high-throughput systems experience is largely historical (Sociomantic, ~2018-2020) rather than central to recent roles. Title is Senior/Staff but technical-strategy and large-scale stakeholder coordination at Staff level are not strongly demonstrated.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks
Prior low-latency distributed systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests/second
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops, OSS)
concerns: Python is not listed in skills or employment history — a must-have for the role
Distributed/high-throughput systems work is dated (2018-2020); recent roles emphasize TypeScript/Node product work
Limited evidence of Staff-level technical strategy, cross-functional stakeholder leadership, or on-call/incident ownership at scale

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
Distributed systems experience is not recent
